Home»Lifestyle»Celeb News»Local Celebs»Tatjana Smith’s husband: Meet Rachel Kolisi’s brother, Joel Smith

Meet Olympic swimmer Tatjana Smith’s husband Joel Smith, who is also the brother of Springboks WAG Rachel Kolisi.

Tatjana Smith won South Africa their first gold medal at the Paris Olympics 2024 after she won the 100m women’s breaststroke on Monday, 29 July. Who is her husband, Joel Smith?

Olympic swimmer Tatjana Smith won the 100m women’s breaststroke in a time of 1:05:28 at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Monday 29 July. This marked South Africa’s first gold medal of the Olympics. Tatjana finished ahead of China’s Qianting Tang (1:05:54) and Ireland’s Mona McSharry (1:05.59).

Tatjana will be competing again on Wednesday, 31 July in the heats and semi-finals of the women’s 200m breaststroke and in the final on Thursday, 1 August.

Take a look atsix things to know about Tatjana here.

Joel Smith is the brother of Rachel Kolisi, who is married to Springboks skipper Siya Kolisi. He married Tatjana in November 2023 at the Pat Busch Mountain Reserve in the Western Cape.

So, when did the romance begin? Well, Joel revealed that he was in a relationship with the Olympic swimmer via an Instagram post on Valentine’s Day in 2023.

“My Valentine ❤️,” he captioned the post.

A post shared by Joel Smith (@jcsmith7)

However, this was not their first post together. Joel added a photo of Tatjana to an album post in January. Tatjana also went “Instagram official” with her Joel in March 2023. She shared a photo of them at what appears to be a rugby stadium.

“..and then you came along and everything changed..,” she captioned the post.

A post shared by -TATJANA-SCHOENMAKER- (@tatjanaschoen)

The pair got engaged in April 2023.

A post shared by Joel Smith (@jcsmith7)

So, what do we know about Joel? He is believed to live in the city of Cape Town, in the Western Cape of South Africa. According toUltimate Rugby, he was born on 30 September 1993. So, he is 30 years old currently.

Joel is a consultant at the Kolisi foundation – founded by Siya and Rachel. He is a travel lover, according to hisInstagram, Joel has been to New York, California, London and more.
